title: Design an idempotent consumer
description: Build a consumer that dedups on event id, commits offset after the effect, and dead-letters poison events.
body: Steps: 1. Extract the stable event id. 2. In one transaction, record the id (unique) and apply the effect; on duplicate id, skip. 3. Commit the offset/ack only after that transaction commits. 4. On transient failure retry with backoff; after the cap publish to a dead-letter topic and commit. 5. Add observability on lag and DLT rate. Rollback point: before enabling auto-commit changes. Validation: a redelivery test yields one effect, an offset is never committed before the effect is durable, and a poison event reaches the DLT without stalling the partition.
